summary: Iteration 19 - Testing KLAT/KL-CAT scores, Cancel class double-click prevention, proof_submitted flag, and view profile endpoints. All 18 backend tests passed. All UI tests passed.

klat_score_teacher_save.details: Teacher can save klat_score via POST /api/teacher/update-full-profile with {klat_score: 'A+'}

klcat_score_counselor_save.details: Counselor can save klcat_score via POST /api/counsellor/update-full-profile

cancel_class_double_prevention.details: POST /api/teacher/cancel-class/{id} on already-cancelled class returns 400 'This class is already cancelled'

proof_submitted_flag.details: GET /api/teacher/dashboard returns proof_submitted boolean on conducted classes

view_teacher_profile_non_admin.details: GET /api/teacher/view-profile/{id} hides bank details for non-admin users

view_teacher_profile_admin.details: GET /api/teacher/view-profile/{id} shows bank details for admin users

view_counselor_profile.details: GET /api/counsellor/view-profile/{id} returns full profile with klcat_score

frontend_teacher_klat_input.details: Teacher profile page shows KLAT Score input field with data-testid='profile-klat-score'

frontend_counselor_klcat_input.details: Counselor profile page shows KL-CAT Score input field with data-testid='profile-klcat-score'

frontend_teacher_cancel_button.details: Teacher cancel button shows disabled state and 'Cancelling...' text during operation (code verified)

frontend_conducted_proof_indicator.details: Conducted classes show 'Submit Proof' or 'Proof Submitted' indicator (code verified - cancelled classes don't show proof button)

frontend_counselor_teacher_popup.details: Counselor teacher popup shows KLAT Score, Star Rating, Phone. Bio/Education/Experience show when populated.

frontend_admin_user_drawer.details: Admin user drawer shows KLAT score, credits, phone, classes. Bank details shown when populated.

updated_files: /app/memory/test_credentials.md - Updated counselor email from counsellor@k.com to counselor@k.com

test_credentials.counselor: counselor@k.com / password123 (NOTE: American spelling in database)

seed_data_creation: Reset passwords for teacher, student, counselor accounts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 fixes verified: 1) KLAT/KL-CAT are manual score fields (string input, not star ratings) - working correctly. 2) Cancel button disabled state implemented - double cancel returns 400 error. 3) Classes auto-move to conducted tab after time ends - working. 4) Profile popups show full details when data is populated. Note: Counselor email in database is 'counselor@k.com' (American spelling), not 'counsellor@k.com'.
